# bitbucketdc_branch_permissions (Resource)

Manages branch restriction rules for a Bitbucket Data Center project. Defines which users and groups are exempted from each restriction type on matching branches.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_key` (String) The key of the project to manage branch restrictions for. Forces replacement if changed.

### Optional

- `restriction` (Block Set) A branch restriction rule. Each block defines one restriction of a given type applied to branches matching the specified matcher. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--restriction))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the resource (equal to project_key).

<a id="nestedblock--restriction"></a>
### Nested Schema for `restriction`

Required:

- `matcher_id` (String) The matcher identifier. For BRANCH: branch name (e.g. main). For PATTERN: glob pattern (e.g. release/*). For MODEL_CATEGORY: BUGFIX, FEATURE, HOTFIX, or RELEASE. For MODEL_BRANCH: production or development. For ANY_REF: use ANY_REF_MATCHER_ID.
- `matcher_type` (String) The type of branch matcher. One of: BRANCH, PATTERN, MODEL_CATEGORY, MODEL_BRANCH, ANY_REF.
- `type` (String) The type of restriction. One of: read-only, no-deletes, fast-forward-only, pull-request-only.

Optional:

- `groups` (Set of String) Group names exempt from this restriction. Omit or set to [] to apply the restriction to everyone.
- `users` (Set of String) Usernames (slugs) exempt from this restriction. Omit or set to [] to apply the restriction to everyone.
